title: Scope the claim: fill in whom and what
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('For ___ the government should ___'); produces a scoped claim, no draft provided

title: Scope a claim on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces a scoped claim from the prompt

title: Scope a claim on a NEW topic
evidence: produces ONE scoped claim on a new topic; no draft provided

title: Finish the claim: fill in the not-X and the but-Y
evidence: fill-in FRAME (not-X-but-Y); produces a nuanced claim, no draft to fix

title: Write a nuanced claim on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces a nuanced claim

title: Write a nuanced claim on a NEW topic
evidence: produces a nuanced claim on a new topic; no draft provided

title: Finish the claim: fill in the limit, the position, and the reason
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('When ___ the government should ___ because ___'); produces a qualified claim

title: Write a qualified claim on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces a qualified claim

title: Write a qualified claim on a NEW topic
evidence: produces a qualified claim on a new topic; no draft provided

title: Warm up: chain just two reasons
evidence: given a claim + two loose reasons as raw material; produces ONE new chained sentence (not a draft to fix)

title: Build a line of reasoning on your own
evidence: cold write; produces a line-of-reasoning paragraph from the claim

title: Build a line of reasoning on a NEW topic
evidence: produces a reasoning paragraph on a new topic; no draft provided

title: Develop the thin claim
evidence: setapart('Thin claim to develop:','The government should fund retraining... It is the right thing to do.') embeds a complete draft; closer 'Rewrite the whole claim as a paragraph'. Provided draft to transform; 'develop' keyword hence flagged

title: Develop a claim on your own
evidence: 'no frame. Write a claim... and develop it'; produces new text, no draft provided

title: Develop a claim on a NEW topic
evidence: 'Write a claim about energy-spending priorities and develop it'; produces new text, no draft provided

title: Analyze a choice and its audience effect
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('Douglass ___ to ___'); produces an analysis sentence, no draft to fix

title: Write a rhetorical-analysis sentence on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces an RA sentence

title: Write a rhetorical-analysis sentence on a NEW text
evidence: produces an RA sentence on a new text; no draft provided

title: Chain choice, effect, and purpose (with a frame)
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('Douglass ___ which ___ so that ___'); produces analysis, no draft to fix

title: Reach the purpose on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces an analytical passage

title: Reach the purpose on a NEW text
evidence: produces an analytical passage on a new text; no draft provided

title: Warm up: trim and frame one quote
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('[set up], "[quote]", [interpret]'); produces a framed sentence, no draft to fix

title: Trim and frame quotes in a full paragraph
evidence: produces an analytical paragraph with trimmed/framed quotes; no draft provided

title: Trim and frame quotes on a NEW text
evidence: produces a paragraph on a new text; no draft provided

title: Revise the summary paragraph into analysis
evidence: setapart('Paragraph to revise:','Douglass talks about... He feels strongly.') embeds a provided draft; 'Revise the summary paragraph... Write the full revised paragraph'

title: Revise a provided paragraph on your own
evidence: setapart('Paragraph to revise:','Douglass criticizes...') embeds a provided draft; 'Revise the summary paragraph below into rhetorical analysis'

title: Revise a summary paragraph on a NEW text
evidence: setapart('Paragraph to revise:','Roosevelt says...') embeds a provided draft; 'Revise the summary paragraph below'

title: Warm up: fill in the grounds
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('This source is credible on ___ because ___'); produces a judgment, no draft to fix

title: Assess credibility on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces a credibility judgment

title: Assess credibility on a NEW source
evidence: produces a credibility judgment on a new source; no draft provided

title: Warm up: fill in a strengths-and-limits frame
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('strong evidence for ___ but ___'); produces an evaluation, no draft to fix

title: Evaluate strengths and limits on your own
evidence: cold write; produces a strengths-and-limits evaluation

title: Evaluate strengths and limits on a NEW source
evidence: produces an evaluation on a new source; no draft provided

title: Write a position anchored to your own example
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('Society should ___ because ___'); produces a position, no draft to fix

title: Anchor a position on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces an anchored position

title: Anchor a position on a NEW prompt
evidence: produces an anchored position on a new prompt; no draft provided

title: Warm up: build the example with a frame
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('Claim: ___. When ___, ___; this shows ___'); produces a paragraph, no draft to fix

title: Develop a specific example on your own
evidence: cold write; produces a body paragraph on one specific example

title: Develop a specific example on a NEW prompt
evidence: produces a body paragraph on a new prompt; no draft provided

title: Finish the position: fill in the frame
evidence: fill-in FRAME ('Perspective ___ is right that ___, but ___, so I hold that ___'); produces a position

title: Weigh and stake on your own
evidence: cold write, no frame; produces a weighed/staked position

title: Weigh and stake on a NEW set
evidence: produces a position on a new perspective set; no draft provided

title: Warm up: write the limit-and-advance turn
evidence: given a concede clause as a stem to continue; 'Write ONE sentence that finishes the turn' (produce, not fix a complete draft)

title: Weigh a perspective on your own
evidence: produces a body paragraph weighing a perspective; no draft provided

title: Weigh a perspective on a NEW set
evidence: produces a weighing paragraph on a new set; no draft provided

title: Reorder to end on the strongest reason
evidence: intro embeds a complete reason string to fix ('We should expand clean power because it can create jobs...'); 'Reorder this reason string so the strongest reason lands last' + cut the weakest

title: Order for emphasis on your own
evidence: 'Write ONE reason string... that ends on its strongest reason'; produces a new ordered string, no draft provided

title: Order for emphasis on a NEW source
evidence: 'Write ONE reason string on the water-use topic...'; produces a new ordered string, no draft provided

title: Tighten this sentence
evidence: intro embeds a complete padded sentence to fix ('In my own personal opinion...'); 'Run a concision pass on this padded sentence' / 'Tighten this sentence'

title: Run a concision pass on your own
evidence: 'write it first as a padded sentence, then tighten it'; student produces then self-tightens, no provided draft (self-revision framing hence flagged)

title: Run a concision pass on a NEW source
evidence: 'write it first as a padded sentence, then run a concision pass'; student produces then self-tightens, no provided draft (self-revision framing hence flagged)

title: Name the type and plan its moves
evidence: produces a short plan (name the task type + first moves); no draft to fix

title: Name the type and plan on your own
evidence: produces a plan naming type + moves; no draft provided

title: Name the type and plan on a NEW prompt
evidence: produces a plan on a new prompt; no draft provided
